member.name: T:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.DOnURequest
member.summary: A callback for tracking HTTP request result.

member.name: T:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.DOnChatRequest
member.summary: A delagate callback for HTTP chat-related request results.
member.param: A chat request result from server. It could be a number, boolean, a chat id string, a server exception message string, or a JSON string in the future.

member.name: T:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.DOnChatNotification
member.summary: A delagate callback for tracking messages from a remote SocketPro HTTP push server.
member.param: An interface to a collection of HTTP server push messages.

member.name: T:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.MessageType
member.summary: A collection of defined message types available from SocketPro HTTP push server.

member.name: F:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.MessageType.Normal
member.summary: A normal message.

member.name: F:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.MessageType.Timeout
member.summary: A timeout message.

member.name: F:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.MessageType.ServerShuttingdownGracefully
member.summary: A message from SocketPro HTTP push server if the server is shutting down gracefully.

member.name: T:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CChatMessage
member.summary: A class containing a number of message atrributes.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CChatMessage.Sender
member.summary: A case-insensitive sender user id.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CChatMessage.ServiceId
member.summary: A non-zero service id of sender.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CChatMessage.IpAddress
member.summary: The server ip address like '111.222.212.121'.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CChatMessage.Port
member.summary: A port number of sender socket. It would be 0 for SocketPro HTTP service. It will be a non-zero number for non-HTTP service.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CChatMessage.Groups
member.summary: The chat groups which the sender is joining to.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CChatMessage.MethodName
member.summary: The method name used for originating the message.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CChatMessage.Message
member.summary: A message string.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CChatMessage.DateTime
member.summary: A date time string when the sender sends the message.

member.name: T:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CHttpPush
member.summary: A class represents a HTTP push result which may contain a list of messages.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CHttpPush.Messages
member.summary: A property for a list of messages.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CHttpPush.Type
member.summary: A message type, Normal, Timeout or ServerShuttingdownGracefully.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CHttpPush.ChatId
member.summary: A chat or session id string.

member.name: T:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CDefaultConfig
member.summary: A class represents a set of url-related atributes used for connecting a web browser to a remote SocketPro HTTP push server.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CDefaultConfig.Protocol
member.summary: A protocol used. It can be either 'http:' or 'https:'.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CDefaultConfig.Port
member.summary: A port number which a remote SocketPro HTTP push server is running on.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CDefaultConfig.PathName
member.summary: A path name like '/UCHAT'.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CDefaultConfig.HostName
member.summary: A server address for SocketPro HTTP server push.

member.name: T:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest
member.summary: A class represents a JavaScript request. The request object defaults to asynchronous calling. However, it can be synchronous if the request is not cross-site or cross-domain.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest.OnURequest(System.Windows.Browser.ScriptObject,System.Windows.Browser.ScriptObject)
member.summary: Never use this method from your code!!! It is reserved by UDAParts.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest.Abort
member.summary: Abort a request.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest.Invoke(SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.DOnURequest)
member.summary: Make an async request to a SocketPro HTTP service server.
member.returns: A non-zero call index or id.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest.Invoke(SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.DOnURequest,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Make an async request to a SocketPro HTTP service server.
member.param: Method (GET or POST) used for HTTP command. Note that it must be true for cross-site request even though it is set to false.
member.returns: A non-zero call index or id.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest.Invoke(SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.DOnURequest,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Make a request to a SocketPro HTTP service server.
member.param: Method (GET or POST) used for HTTP command. Note that it must be true for cross-site request even though it is set to false.
Sync or Async. Note that it must be async for cross-site (domain) even though it is set to sync.
member.returns: A non-zero call index or id.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest.Clear
member.summary: Clear all of the pairs of parameter and value.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest.Add``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Addd parameter and its value in pair.
member.param: A case-sensitive string for parameter name.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest.Add(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Add an input parameter and its value in pair.
member.param: A map containing a collection of parameter name and value in pair.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest.Add(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Add an input parammeter and its value in pair.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest.Name
member.summary: Request name.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest.CrossSite
member.summary: A property indicating if the request is cross-site (or cross-domain) one.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest.CallIndex
member.summary: An positive index number for a request.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest.Script
member.summary: A script (cross domain) or XMLHttpRequest (same domain) object.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest.Sync
member.summary: A synchronous request or asynchronous one. It must be false if the request is cross-site or cross-domain.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CRequest.Get
member.summary: The property indicating if the request is sent through HTTP command GET. It must be true if the request is cross-site or cross-domain.

member.name: T:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CUChat
member.summary: A class stands for the JavaScript object UChat in SocketProAdapter for JavaScript. Listen or subscribe request is always asynchronous one. A chatting request defaults to asynchronous one. However, it can be synchronous if it is not cross-site or cross-domain.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CUChat.OnPushMessage(System.Windows.Browser.ScriptObject,System.Windows.Browser.ScriptObject)
member.summary: Never use this method from your code!!! It is reserved by UDAParts.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CUChat.Enter(System.String,System.UInt32[])
member.summary: Joing one or more HTTP chatting groups.
member.param: A use id to represent this client.
An array of chatting group ids.
member.returns: A chat request. If SocketProAdapter for JavaScript is not available, the method returns null or nothing.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CUChat.Exit
member.summary: Exit from HTTP chatting groups.
member.returns: A chat request. If SocketProAdapter for JavaScript is not available, the method returns null or nothing.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CUChat.Speak(System.String,System.UInt32[])
member.summary: Send a message onto one or more chatting groups.
member.param: An array of chatting group ids.
member.returns: A request object.If SocketProAdapter for JavaScript is not available, the method returns null or nothing.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CUChat.SendUserMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Send a message to one specific client identified by a case-insensitive receiver.
member.param: A user id for a receiver. It is case-insensitive.
member.returns: A request object. If SocketProAdapter for JavaScript is not available, the method returns null or nothing.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CUChat.Subscribe(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Subscribe messages from SocketPro HTTP push server with delay time. Usually, you will not use this method. The library will take care of it for you on the fly.

member.name: E:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CUChat.OnMessage
member.summary: An event for a list of messages from a remote SocketPro HTTP push server.

member.name: E:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CUChat.OnChatRequest
member.summary: An event for tracking the returning result of a chat-related request.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CUChat.Sync
member.summary: Read or set using synchronous (true) or asynchronous chatting (false). The property must be false if it is cross-site or domain.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CUChat.Get
member.summary: Read or set HTTP command GET (true) or POST (false) used. The property must be true if it is cross-site or domain.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CUChat.CrossSite
member.summary: Cross site (domain) or same site (domain) chatting.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CUChat.Chatting
member.summary: Indicating if it is chatting.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.CUChat.ChatId
member.summary: A chat id (or session) string of GUID.

member.name: T:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.UHTTP
member.summary: A static class represents a singleton of the JavaScript object UHTTP inside SocketProAdapter for JavaScript.

member.name: M:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.UHTTP.CreateHttpRequest(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create a HTTP request object.
member.param: A channel for processing the request on server side.
member.returns: A HTTP request object. If SocketProAdapter for JavaScript is not available, the method returns null or nothing.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.UHTTP.SocketProServerAddress
member.summary: A url address to a remote (COMET) SocketPro server.If SocketProAdapter for JavaScript is not available, the property will be an empty string with zero length.You can set a url string to a remote SocketPro server like "http://www.mydomain.com/" if you don't set it on html page by JavaScript tag.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.UHTTP.DefaultConfiguration
member.summary: Default configuration corresponding to the JavaScript object defaultConfig inside SocketProAdapter for JavaScript.

member.name: P:SocketProAdapter.ClientSide.UHTTP.UChat
member.summary: A HTTP chat object corresponding to the JavaScript UChat object inside SocketProAdapter for JavaScript.
